Overrides.Override: 15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Nimis Topaz Ring Unique ID: 5a311d0ec60e3de280c64bdd624fa5a60bd599af09caa86d7a9d572e42c07a66 Item Level: 87 LevelReq: 12 Implicits: 1 +30% to Lightning Resistance +52 to Dexterity 28% increased Projectile Damage Projectiles Return to you Projectiles are fired in random directions

Rarity: RARE Golem Salvation Necrotic Armour Evasion: 1080 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.9979 Energy Shield: 217 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.9965 Unique ID: e37b6e7fd461d666b83a6e7b2e8688f639bda8d0f7dc58383a01055ff44f2154 Warlord Item Crusader Item Item Level: 94 Quality: 30 Sockets: W-W-W-W-W-W LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 1 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Resistance Modifier magnitudes Ignore Stuns while using Socketed Attack Skills Socketed Attacks have -20 to Total Mana Cost +22% chance to Suppress Spell Damage 10% increased maximum Life 10% increased maximum Mana +19% to all Elemental Resistances 12% increased Area of Effect Enemies you Kill have a 35% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage Adds 1 to 5 Lightning Damage for each Shocked Enemy you've Killed Recently
